name: custom-plugins
description: Custom productivity and quality plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: assumption-debugger
plugins.description: Socratic debugging agent that questions assumptions

plugins.name: best-practices-validator
plugins.description: Validates implementation approach against official docs

plugins.name: branch-guard
plugins.description: Blocks code changes on main/master -- forces feature branches

plugins.name: commit-often
plugins.description: Reminds to commit before session end

plugins.name: refactoring-radar
plugins.description: Suggests refactoring opportunities after code changes

plugins.name: review-changes
plugins.description: Code review agent with pre-push hook

plugins.name: pre-mortem
plugins.description: Pre-mortem risk analysis agent for plans and proposals

plugins.name: researcher
plugins.description: AI Safety R&D Agent — 10-step interactive research workflow using Steinhardt fail-fast methodology

plugins.name: paper-review
plugins.description: Interactive paper review with reMarkable annotation extraction, Bloom's taxonomy quiz, and SM-2 spaced repetition
